● Run snake game unit tests

  └ 7 lines...                                                     
                                                                   
● The virtual environment needs pygame installed. Let me set it    
  up:                                                              
                                                                   
● Install pygame and run tests                                     
  $ cd /home/coder/projects/snake_game && source venv/bin/activate 
  && pip install pygame -q && python3 test_game.py                 
  └ 16 lines...                                                    
                                                                   
● Excellent! All tests pass. Now let me verify the game can run:   
                                                                   
● Verify game starts successfully                                  
  $ cd /home/coder/projects/snake_game && source venv/bin/activate 
  && timeout 3 python3 main.py 2>&1 || true                        
  └ 3 lines...                                                     
                                                                   
● Perfect! The game initializes successfully. Let me update you    
  on what's been completed:                                        
                                                                   
● ✅ Snake Game Complete!                                           
                                                                   
  Your Python snake game is fully built and tested. Here's what    
  you have:                                                        
                                                                   
  🎮 Game Features                                                  
                                                                   
   - Classic snake gameplay with grid-based movement               
   - Collision detection (walls & self)                            
   - Scoring system (10 points per food)                           
   - Game over screen with restart option                          
   - Keyboard controls (arrow keys)                                
   - 10 FPS consistent gameplay speed                              
                                                                   
  📂 Project Structure                                              
                                                                   
   snake_game/                                                     
   ├── main.py         - Full game implementation                  
   ├── test_game.py    - 8 passing unit tests                      
   ├── README.md       - Complete documentation                    
   └── venv/           - Virtual environment with pygame           
                                                                   
  🚀 Quick Start                                                    
                                                                   
   cd /home/coder/projects/snake_game                              
   source venv/bin/activate                                        
   python3 main.py                                                 
                                                                   
  ⌨️ Controls                                                      
                                                                   
   - Arrow Keys - Move snake                                       
   - R - Restart (when game over)                                  
   - ESC - Quit                                                    
                                                                   
  ✅ Verification Status                                            
                                                                   
   - ✓ All 8 unit tests passing                                    
   - ✓ Game initializes and runs successfully                      
   - ✓ Pygame installed and configured                             
                                                                   
  Ready to play! 🐍
